title: 20-Year NDL Warranty — TPO Membrane Roofing System
conditions: Installation by Carlisle-authorized applicator with current ESP status
Manufacturer pre-installation inspection completed and approved
Manufacturer final inspection completed within 60 days of roof completion
All penetration flashings installed per Carlisle technical details
Minimum membrane thickness of 60 mil TPO
Annual maintenance program maintained by building owner
No unauthorized modifications or penetrations without manufacturer approval
exclusions: Damage caused by other trades working on the roof after completion
Acts of nature exceeding design wind speed (120 mph)
Ponding water caused by structural deflection beyond design tolerances
Damage from foot traffic without walk pad protection
Consequential damages including interior damage from leaks
documentation_required: Pre-installation inspection report signed by manufacturer representative
Final inspection report signed by manufacturer representative
Warranty application form with project details
Seam probe and pull test results
Executed maintenance agreement between owner and maintenance contractor
notes: NDL (No Dollar Limit) warranty covers material and labor for the full 20-year term with no prorated depreciation. Manufacturer final inspection must be scheduled at least 14 days in advance.
